close_reason: Transitive deps already working - godeps-gen includes indirect deps by default (-indirect=true). Verified golang.org/x/mod in godeps cell.
description:
Extend Go deps cell to handle transitive dependencies.

**Simpler solution identified:**
Go's module system already computes the full transitive dependency graph. Indirect deps are marked with `// indirect` in go.mod and their hashes are in go.sum.

Current godeps-gen skips indirect deps:
```go
if strings.Contains(line, "// indirect") {
    continue
}
```

Simply removing this skip will capture all transitive dependencies automatically.

**Remaining work:**
1. Use modfile parser (turnkey-bbm) which exposes `Require[].Indirect` flag cleanly
2. Remove the indirect skip in godeps-gen
3. Test with a package that has transitive deps (e.g., spf13/cobra)

**Note:** Inter-package dependency relationships for Buck2's `deps` field is a separate concern handled by BUCK file generation (turnkey-9ws).

Depends on: turnkey-bbm (modfile parser provides clean indirect flag access)
title: Go external deps: transitive dependency graphs
